author: y4rr
content: Result: MobileNetV2 + MobileNetV3-Small V.2 forward parity conformance lane delivered in Sprint B.5.b / V.2. 10 conformance tests in conformance_vision_models.rs (output_shape, output_finite, param_count, custom_num_classes, deterministic_forward for both V2 and V3-Small). All tests pass.
